events.title: Lakes to Queries: Building High-Performance Data Platforms
events.fullDate: Saturday, Jul 4 • 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM IST
events.fullLocation: iDFy Mumbai, Unit no. 801, Skyline Icon, 804, Andheri - Kurla Rd, Chimalpada, Marol, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400059 - Mumbai
events.description: Join us for a community meetup exploring how modern teams are rethinking data architecture from the ground up. From designing scalable data lakes to building fast, reliable query layers on top of them, speakers will share real production experiences and practical lessons learned along the way.
events.longDescription:
Join us for a community meetup exploring how modern teams are rethinking data architecture from the ground up. Join us for a community meetup exploring how modern teams are rethinking data architecture from the ground up. From designing scalable data lakes to building fast, reliable query layers on top of them, speakers will share real production experiences and practical lessons learned along the way. Whether you are architecting a new data platform or evolving an existing one, this is your chance to learn from engineers who have done it, connect with the local data community, and walk away with ideas you can put to work immediately.

Don't miss out! RSVP and secure your spot!

agenda.task: Talk 1 - Scaling to a Billion: Building a Maritime Data Lake with ClickHouse Cloud by Vishal Dubey, CTO, RUDRA Cybersecurity Pvt. Ltd.
Talk 2 - Trillions of Rows, Flat Bill: How iDFy Runs Multi-Tenant Insights-as-a-Service on a 2-Node ClickHouse Cluster by Hrishikesh Bihani, Sr. Technical Architect @ iDFy

faqs.question: What advantages do I gain from making a booking through your portal?
faqs.answer: We can assist you in securing the most favorable negotiated rates for venues. Our portal serves as a comprehensive solution for all your event-related bookings. Our dedicated team is ready to help you not only in booking the ideal venue but also in coordinating additional services such as catering, artists, and event themes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you confirm my booking?
faqs.answer: Confirmation times vary by venue, but our automated system typically provides an initial status within 24 hours. Our concierge team follows up immediately to finalize all details and ensure your date is secured.

faqs.question: What types of events do you provide services for?
faqs.answer: We handle a wide range of events including Corporate Meetups, Exhibitions, Weddings, Product Launches, and Private Parties. Our diverse service network is equipped to manage events of any scale.

faqs.question: What's the best way for me to obtain the most favorable rates?
faqs.answer: Booking in advance and utilizing our bundled service packages (Venue + Catering + Decor) is the most effective way to secure premium discounts and negotiated rates through our portal.

faqs.question: Are there any extra fees associated with the booking?
faqs.answer: Transparency is our priority. All standard service fees are included in the quote. Any optional add-ons or venue-specific security deposits will be clearly outlined before you finalize your payment.

faqs.question: Is it possible for me to modify or cancel my booking?
faqs.answer: Yes, modifications can be made through your dashboard. Cancellations are subject to the specific venue's policy, which is displayed at the time of booking. Our support team is always available to assist with special requests.
